news.title: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
news.snippet: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.

news.title: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
news.snippet: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.

news.title: Snapchat owner cuts 1,000 jobs as says AI will reduce repetitive work
news.snippet: The Snapchat owner is laying off around 16% of staff and withdrawn hundreds of open job roles.

news.title: Man charged with attempted murder over attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
news.snippet: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.

news.title: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
news.snippet: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.

news.title: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
news.snippet: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.

news.title: OpenAI boss Sam Altman's home targeted with Molotov cocktail
news.snippet: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.

news.title: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
news.snippet: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: Is there a way to fix AI's problem with trust?

news.title: ‘Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender’ Leaked Online. Some Fans Say Paramount Deserves the Fallout
news.snippet: After the full movie leaked, animators mourned the chance to release their work as intended. Others feel the leak is justified in light of Paramount’s marketing blunders and association with Trump.

news.title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
news.snippet: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

news.title: The US Government Will Ask Data Centers How Much Power They Use
news.snippet: In a letter obtained by WIRED, the Energy Information Administration tells two senators that it plans to develop a mandatory assessment of data centers' energy use.

news.title: Allbirds Is Pivoting to AI Compute. Sure, Why Not
news.snippet: Once a $4 billion apparel juggernaut, Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI, a “GPU-as-a-Service” company. Hey, if you can't beat ’em, join ’em.

news.title: AI Slop Is Making the Internet Fake-Happy
news.snippet: A new study examines the impact of the rise of AI-generated websites on the internet—and found some surprising results.

news.title: Amazon-backed X-energy files to raise up to $800M in IPO
news.snippet: Nuclear startup X-energy hit the road today to sell prospective investors on its initial public offering.

news.title: Wait, could they still actually break up Live Nation?
news.snippet: A federal jury found that Live Nation has acted illegally as a monopoly -- but the company just came to a tentative settlement with the DOJ last month.

news.title: Monarch Tractor’s collapse ends with an acquisition by Caterpillar
news.snippet: The startup had faced mounting pressure from dealers, farmers, and a co-founder who complained that Monarch's tech didn't work properly.

news.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
news.snippet: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

news.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
news.snippet: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

news.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
news.snippet: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

news.title: Feds will require data centers to show their power bills
news.snippet: In a first, the U.S. Energy Information Agency said it will require data centers to disclose details of their energy use.

news.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
news.snippet: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

news.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
news.snippet: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

news.title: This Khosla-backed autonomous pod startup just raised $170M — now it’s aiming for more
news.snippet: Glydways is in talks to raise another $250 million as it prepares to launch three pilot programs.

news.title: Accel raises $5B to back late-stage bets
news.snippet: Accel announced on Tuesday that it raised $5 billion in fresh capital to back late-stage companies building AI.

news.title: India’s vibe-coding startup Emergent enters OpenClaw-like AI agent space
news.snippet: Emergent's Wingman lets users manage and automate tasks through chat on platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

news.title: Anthropic shrugs off VC funding offers valuing it at $800B+, for now
news.snippet: VCs are frothing at the mouth to write more checks to Anthropic at a valuation that matches or beats OpenAI's.

news.title: 「美股例外」何时休？
news.snippet:
作者 | 黄绎达
  编辑 | 张帆

news.title: 推理卡毛利率下滑超7%，天数智芯「降价换量」的买卖值不值？
news.snippet: 2个多月前在港股上市的天数智芯，近期发布了2025年财报。公布当天，股价下跌了10个点。在此之前，天数股价已从342港元的高位大幅回调。财报显示，天数全年营收10.34亿元，同比增长91.6%。一级市场投资人林云直言，这个表现没有达到大家的心理预期。对比其他几家国产公司这两年来的增长速度，市场给天数的营收底线预期是：12亿元。但另一方面，分析师Ethan透露，资本

news.title: 明日新程完成连续两轮融资，领跑Harness群体多智能体赛道
news.snippet: 日前，由微软小冰原班人马成立的新公司“明日新程”宣布已连续完成两轮融资，重仓布局Harness群体多智能体赛道。其中，天使轮融资由创新工场和Atypical Ventures联合领投，奇绩创坛继续跟投，其余参投方包括原微软全球副总裁David Ku等个人投资者、公司独家财务顾问安可资本等。目前，公司已募得供未来三到五年持续创新的所需资金。明日新程（英文名：Next

news.title: 阿里ATH发布AI开发工具Meoo，已打通阿里云核心产品
news.snippet: 4月15日，阿里ATH事业群发布旗下首款AI开发工具Meoo（秒悟），该工具集成了千问、Kimi、GLM、MiniMax四大顶尖模型，并内置阿里云数据库、存储等核心产品服务，用户无需任何编程基础，只需用自然语言描述想法，Meoo最快1分钟就能自动生成前端后端完整的网站、H5页面，并在阿里云上一键部署上线。即日起，所有用户可直接访问官网体验（Meoo入口：https://meoo.com/ ）

news.title: 美团闪购升级闪电仓供应链服务平台：向全行业商家开放即时零售供应链基建
news.snippet: 4月15日，美团闪购面向全体闪电仓商家，升级供应链服务平台“闪电帮帮”，开放全套即时零售供应链基建：在帮助商家提升货盘质量、提高采购效率、优化服务体验三方面发力，帮助闪电仓商家迭代升级货盘、提高经营效率，远离“低价低质内卷”，实现更低成本采购、更高质量货盘、更稳用户复购，走向精耕细作、稳定可持续经营的发展新阶段。&nbsp

news.title: 阿里云连续5年稳居游戏云市场份额第一！
news.snippet: 4月15日，IDC《中国游戏云市场跟踪，2025H2》最新数据显示，2025年下半年阿里云市场份额位列第一，带动全年份额持续上涨。这也是阿里云连续第5年稳居中国游戏云市场第一。其中，在游戏云解决方案、基础设施两大细分市场，阿里云均为第一，份额分别为42%、39%。阿里云以23%增速领涨解决方案市场，其大数据及AI解决方案成为核心增长引擎。<span style="
